title: The Foundation
author: Louisa May Alcott
content: “I am not afraid of storms, for I am learning how to ship my sail.”
action: View current challenges as necessary skill development.

title: The Framework
author: Mark Twain
content: “The secret of getting ahead is getting started.”

title: The Stress Test
author: Emily Dickinson
content: “Character is not cut in marble—it is not something that is laid down for us—it is something that we forge.”
action: Use pressure to solidify your principles.

title: The Restoration
author: Maya Angelou
content: “We may encounter many defeats but we must not be defeated.”
action: Reframe setbacks as temporary data points.

title: The Structure
author: Will Durant
content: “We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.”
action: Codify your best practices into your daily rhythm.
